description: Detects PHP classes with too many symbols, indicating a need to split responsibilities. Simplified from Rust: flags all classes via select:symbol without method/property counting. Cannot apply the 10-method threshold, composite threshold (7 methods + 10 properties), or trait-use allowance adjustment.

flag.message: class detected -- verify it does not have too many methods/properties (god class detection simplified: method counting not available in JSON DSL)
